mapper.select: /** UsptCnvnSclpstHistDao.selectMaxHist */ select a.* from ( select cnvn_sclpst_hist_id ,cnvn_change_req_id ,confm_cnvn_sclpst_hist_id ,indvdl_bsnm_div_cd ,bsnm_nm ,bizrno ,ceo_nm ,charger_nm ,charger_mbtlnum ,charger_email ,row_number() over (order by created_dt desc) as rn from uspt_cnvn_sclpst_hist where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and ( confm_cnvn_sclpst_hist_id is null or confm_cnvn_sclpst_hist_id = '') ) a where a.rn = 1

/** UsptCnvnSclpstHistDao.selectUsptCnvnSclpstHistChangeDe */ select cnvn_change_req_id , to_char(created_dt,'yyyymmdd') as change_de , to_char(created_dt,'yyyymmddhh24miss') as change_dt from uspt_cnvn_sclpst_hist where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and ( confm_cnvn_sclpst_hist_id is null or confm_cnvn_sclpst_hist_id ='') /*변경전정보는 제외*/ order by created_dt desc

/** UsptCnvnSclpstHistDao.selectUsptCnvnSclpstHistByDt */ select 'before' as change_be_af ,cnvn_sclpst_hist_id ,cnvn_change_req_id ,confm_cnvn_sclpst_hist_id ,indvdl_bsnm_div_cd ,bsnm_nm ,bizrno ,ceo_nm ,charger_nm ,charger_mbtlnum ,charger_email ,to_char(created_dt,'yyyy-mm-dd') as change_de from uspt_cnvn_sclpst_hist where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and confm_cnvn_sclpst_hist_id is not null and confm_cnvn_sclpst_hist_id !='' union all select 'after' as change_be_af ,cnvn_sclpst_hist_id ,cnvn_change_req_id ,confm_cnvn_sclpst_hist_id ,indvdl_bsnm_div_cd ,bsnm_nm ,bizrno ,ceo_nm ,charger_nm ,charger_mbtlnum ,charger_email ,to_char(created_dt,'yyyy-mm-dd') as change_de from uspt_cnvn_sclpst_hist where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and ( confm_cnvn_sclpst_hist_id is null or confm_cnvn_sclpst_hist_id ='') and to_char(created_dt,'yyyymmddhh24miss') = #{changeDt}
